# ghb20030410-debug.github.io[HOTPOT最新三角洲考核标准.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26609986/HOTPOT.pdf)
[HOTPOT最新无畏契约考核标准.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26609987/HOTPOT.pdf)
[HOTPOT最新三角洲考核标准.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26610427/HOTPOT.html)

@media screen and (min-device-pixel-ratio:0), (-webkit-min-device-pixel-ratio:0), (min--moz-device-pixel-ratio: 0) {.pdf24_view{ font-size:10em; transform:scale(0.1); -moz-transform:scale(0.1); -webkit-transform:scale(0.1); -moz-transform-origin:top left; -webkit-transform-origin:top left; } }
.pdf24_layer { }.pdf24_ie { font-size: 1pt; }

.pdf24_grlink { position:relative;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:1000000; }

}

}

}

}

}

}

}

}

}

}

}

	letter-spacing: 0.2498em;
}

	letter-spacing: -0.011em;
}

 body > div {
	box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.3) !important;
	margin: 20px auto !important;
}

</head>
	<body>
		<div id="page_0" class="pdf24_ pdf24_02">
			<div class="pdf24_view">
				<div class="pdf24_03 pdf24_04">
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:20.0842em;top:6.2144em;"><span class="pdf24_05 pdf24_06 pdf24_07" style="font-weight:bold;">HOTPO</span><span class="pdf24_05 pdf24_06 pdf24_08" style="font-weight:bold;">T</span><span class="pdf24_05 pdf24_06 pdf24_09" style="font-weight:bold;">三</span><span class="pdf24_05 pdf24_06 pdf24_09" style="font-weight:bold;">角洲考核标准 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:8.3844em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_11">娱乐考核要求： &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:10.5544em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_12">男：三取二机密杀八个(巴克仕或航天) &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:12.7444em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_13">女：三取二机密杀六个(巴克仕或航天)双考九个人头(两男十个)差不能超四个考官要 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:14.2344em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_14">参与看情绪价值(考官自己选择起装或不起装) &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:18.5844em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_11">技术考核要求： &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:20.7644em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_15">男三取二绝密</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_16">杀</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">1</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_17">2</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_18">个</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_19">(巴克仕</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_20">和</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">1</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_21">5</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">航</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_22">天监狱不变)金牌女三取二绝密</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_23">杀</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">1</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_24">0</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">个</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">(巴克仕 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:22.2669em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_25">航天监狱) &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:24.4469em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_26">双考加三个头(不可养猪被劝具体情况考官决定考官有绝对解释权)(不可养猪意思是不 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:25.9369em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_25">能摸尸体) &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:28.1169em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_27">账号要求段位黑鹰往上禁用六套红蛋 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:32.4569em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_11">顶技考核要求： &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:34.6369em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_28">男三把合计</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_29">杀</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">2</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_21">4</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">个</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_30">(巴克仕监狱加三个(监狱强度够高可以不加)航天不变)巅峰女三把 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:36.1485em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">合计</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_31">杀</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">2</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_21">1</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">个</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_32">(巴克仕监狱加三个(监狱强度够高可以不加)航天不变)双考男</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_33">加</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_17">6</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">个</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_34">双考 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:37.6485em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">女</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_31">加</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_17">5</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">个</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_32">(可养) &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:39.8185em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_13" style="word-spacing:-0.0021em;">账号要求段位三角洲巅峰 六</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_17">套</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">a</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_21">w</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">二</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_15" style="word-spacing:-0.0072em;">选一 双考只能一</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_35">个</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">a</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_21">w</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">一</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_19">个六套 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:44.1585em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_11">魔王考核要求： &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:46.3486em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_28">男三把合计</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_29">杀</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">3</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_21">0</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">个</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_22">(限航天实在想考巴克仕或监狱就与考官商量人加多少根据强度定 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:47.8385em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_36">第一把打完立刻定)魔王女同上双考</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_33">杀</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_09">3</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_21">5</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_21">个 &nbsp;</span></div>
					<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:7.502em;top:50.0085em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_06 pdf24_30">账号要求三角洲巅峰无装备限制 &nbsp;</span></div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</body>
</html>
